zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Turner於大約1505年出生在英國英格蘭肯特塞頓 瓦倫斯時，他的父親Thomas Turner28歲，母親?32歲。他於1584年4月27日與Benet Goldesmythe在英國英格蘭肯特麥德斯同結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年之前在英國肯特塞頓 瓦倫斯。

nameMeanings.name: Turner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English t(o)urnour, turner ‘turner’ (Old French to(u)rn(e)our), mainly denoting someone who fashioned small objects of wood, metal, or bone on a lathe, but also a variety of other occupations, including turnspit and translator or interpreter. This surname may have become confused with Toner . In North America, it is also very common among African Americans.

English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English turn-hare, a compound of Middle English tournen ‘to turn, direct, steer’ + hare ‘hare’, a name for someone in charge of the greyhounds in hare coursing or an exaggerated compliment for someone who could run fast. See also Turnbull .
English: perhaps also from Middle English t(o)urn(e)our ‘jouster, one who takes part in a tournament’ (Old French tornoieor, tournoieur).

variants.name: Trinder
meanings: English (Oxfordshire and Gloucestershire): occupational name from a derivative of Middle English trenden ‘to turn, roll, twist’ (Old English trendan), denoting someone who turned something such as wood or fibres. Compare Turner , Spinner .

variants.name: Toner
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tomhrair ‘descendant of Tomhrar’, a Gaelicized form of the Norse personal name Thorr. Compare Thunder .
English: nickname from Old French toner ‘thunder’, perhaps for someone with a thunderous voice. Compare Thunder .

variants.name: Tarner
meanings: English: variant of   Turner  . This form of the surname is relatively rare in Britain and Ireland. It may sometimes have been confused with   Taverner  .
German (North Rhine-Westphalia): unexplained. This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Turner was born about 1505, in Sutton Valence, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Turner, was 28 and his mother, ?, was 32. He married Benet Goldesmythe on 27 April 1584, in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died before 1552, in Sutton Valence, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Turner est né environ 1505, à Sutton Valence, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Turner, avait 28 ans et sa mère, ?, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Benet Goldesmythe le 27 avril 1584, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 1552, à Sutton Valence, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Turnerが約1505年にイギリスイギリスケントスットオン ベレンスで生まれた時，父Thomas Turnerは28歳，母?は32歳であった。1584年4月27日にイギリスイギリスケントメイドストーンでBenet Goldesmytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年以前にイギリスケントスットオン ベレンスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Turner(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 발스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Turner(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 ?(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1584년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 메이드스톤에서 Benet Goldesmythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 이전 영국 켄트 수턴 발스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Turner родился около 1505 г. в местности суттон веиленс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Turner было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали ?, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Benet Goldesmythe 27 апреля 1584 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер перед 1552 г. в местности суттон веиленс, кэнт, Англия.
